name: Attack Volleyball Club
description: Attack Volleyball Club is a place to play pickleball in Lockport, IL. There are 9 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, food, and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play.

name: Brent Hassert Park
description: Brent Hassert Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Crest Hill, IL. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, trainers or lessons, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Cadence Sports Center
description: Cadence Sports Center is a place to play pickleball in Joliet, IL. There is 1 indoor hard and acrylic court. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, and lights. The court is free.
